fields.helpText: This field represents Medical Foster Home Name in HBHC Medical Foster Home file (#633.2).  The medical foster home record is missing data.  Field updated by package only, no user input.

This field represents fields to update (actually DR string supplied for  DIE call) of Medical Foster Home data in HBHC Medical Foster Home file  (#633.2).  Field allows for 1-245 characters of free text.  Field updated  by package only, no user input.
